/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/database/db_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/database/friend_dao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/database/group_dao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/database/message_dao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/database/user_dao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/handlers/auth_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/handlers/friend_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/handlers/group_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/handlers/message_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/session_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/websocket_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/utils/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o -o chat_server  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libboost_system.so.1.87.0 /usr/local/lib/libboost_thread.so.1.87.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so
